category_sources: Official NetBSD-hosted tradcpp page describes it as a traditional C preprocessor for historical preprocessing use cases.
display_name_sources: Official NetBSD-hosted page heading uses tradcpp.
docs_sources: Official page documents purpose, limitations, trace mode, releases, and bug reporting.
source_facts.homepage is the official NetBSD-hosted project page.
repo_sources: Official NetBSD-hosted project page links a Mercurial repository but notes the public copy is not currently working.
tags_sources: Official project page describes pkgsrc use, whitespace preservation, makefile preprocessing, and trace mode.
